/usr/bin/clang++  -O3 -march=native -DNDEBUG -flto -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/minecraft.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraft.dir/src/chunk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraft.dir/src/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraft.dir/src/stb_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraft.dir/thirdparty/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/minecraft.dir/thirdparty/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraft.dir/thirdparty/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraft.dir/thirdparty/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraft.dir/thirdparty/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraft.dir/thirdparty/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minecraft.dir/thirdparty/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o minecraft  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL
